system.description:
Bards have an uncanny ability to move others through the power of performance. Benefits of the Bard. The Bard is a partial Expert class that must be joined with a second partial class by an Adventurer. A Partial Warrior/Bard might be a martial skald, a Partial Expert/Bard a light-fingered troubadour, and a Partial Mage/Bard might mix true magic with artful performances. All Bards gain Perform-0 during character creation; their abilities hinge on moving a listener by song, musicianship, or stirring oratory. Unlike normal Partial Experts, Bards do not get a bonus non-combat Focus at first level or a bonus skill point on level advancement. One who takes standard Partial Expert as the other class gains those benefits normally.
